executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification blocked by external marketing loop: stale independent verification artifact (4+ days) and primary-repo adoption measurement-pending. Architecture-owned gates are all green.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Architecture-owned gates are fully green. The remaining blocker is external: Marketing must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence and rerun independent verification.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails closed (last pass: 2026-06-02, verdict=fail). Primary-repo adoption measurement-pending. Reddit/Apollo channels blocked.
findings.root_cause: External marketing loop owns the outcome evidence; architecture cannot self-certify marketing health.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: Architecture-owned verifier/checker/runner stack is green
findings.mechanism: Fresh independent verification returned qualified_pass. Architecture verifier passes clean (ok: true, errors: []). All architecture-owned gates (verifier, checker, runner, loop integrity, shared market-intelligence consumption) are coherent.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side repair from previous run (failing verifier due to artifact timing) is now resolved. Verifier artifact-contract-fail escalation (343 repeats) will clear on next health-monitor run.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain direct cron inspection as source of truth on each run; rerun independent verification after each material architecture artifact change.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology matches runtime state
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection: 19 total, 19 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 last-error, 0 running. No topology drift.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue direct cron inspection; never conflate persisted disabled history with live runtime topology.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only
findings.mechanism: Zero disabled jobs in live Gateway topology. Persisted history in jobs.json remains separate.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live cleanup; correctly separated.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology in every audit.

findings.title: Loop "pypi-auto-unblocker" has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Script pypi_auto_unblocker.py (211 lines) has escalation logic (3-day, 7-day) but no self-improvement mandate. When outcomes are flat, this loop will repeat the same tactics forever. Not registered in self_improvement_loops.json.
findings.root_cause: Loop was created as an operational unblocker; it has bounded escalation but no mechanism to redesign its approach when stuck.
findings.recommended_fix: Either: (1) Add a self_improvement_mandate with flat-outcome detection and redesign trigger, register in self_improvement_loops.json with checker/runner/verifier; OR (2) Reclassify as monitor-only/owner_only if self-improvement is not the intent for this operational unblocker.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Marketing owner loop: produce fresh measurable adoption/outcome evidence and rerun independent verification
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing independent verification has been fail since June 2 (4+ days stale). Primary-repo adoption flat. Reddit/Apollo channels blocked.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Finding persists across watchdog runs. Either upgrade to full self-improving loop or reclassify explicitly.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Removes contract ambiguity from the loop registry.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Architecture verifier now passes clean (ok: true, errors: []). Independent verification fresh and qualified_pass. Previous failing verifier artifact-contract-fail (343 repeats) resolved by independent verification refresh from last run. No new repairs required this run.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification: qualified_pass. Architecture-owned gates all green. External marketing blocker correctly isolated.
independent_verification.previous_artifact_summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent and verifier passes green, but marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo movement is measurement-pending and verification artifact is 4+ days stale.

runtime_assertions.health_monitor_verifier_escalation_expec: Verifier now passes green with fresh independent verification. The artifact_contract_fail (343 repeats) captured a state predating this watchdog run. Next health-monitor cycle should drop the verifier_runtime and escalation issues.

notes: Architecture-owned gates: ALL GREEN. Verifier passes (ok: true, errors: []). Independent verification: qualified_pass.
Architecture verifier artifact-contract-fail escalation (343 repeats in health monitor) captured a pre-repair state. Verifier now passes and next health-monitor cycle should clear the escalation.
Live topology: 19/19/0/0 — all enabled, zero disabled, zero errors, zero running.
Loop integrity: both covered loops green (ralph-docs-watchdog ok, agent-architecture-watchdog ok).
pypi-auto-unblocker lacks self-improvement mandate — either upgrade or reclassify.
Remaining blocker is purely external: marketing independent verification stale (4+ days) and primary-repo adoption flat.
